channel.title: Home-Automation on karl
channel.description: Recent content in Home-Automation on karl

item.title: Converting PurpleAir Classic to ESPHome
item.description:
Converting a PurpleAir Classic to ESPHome

I still don’t 100% know what the issue is but for the past several months, my PurpleAir Classic sensor has been incredibly flakey when it comes to reporting data. Home Assistant would report random bouts of “timeouts” while trying to poll the sensor and that would result in gaps in the data. In the best case, the gaps were only a few minutes long but sometimes they would last for hours at a time.
